Buy Tickets

Dare to Discover Austin's Dark Side

Austin's Only Ghost Tour on Wheels —
Prices starting at $49 per person.

Book a Tour See Our Tours
THRILLSCHILLSAUTOMOBILESTHRILLSCHILLSAUTOMOBILESTHRILLSCHILLSAUTOMOBILESTHRILLSCHILLSAUTOMOBILESTHRILLSCHILLSAUTOMOBILESTHRILLSCHILLSAUTOMOBILESTHRILLSCHILLSAUTOMOBILESTHRILLSCHILLSAUTOMOBILES

Keep
Austin
Haunted

Austin's dark history is waiting. Join us for a ghost tour unlike any other — on wheels, after dark, through the city's most haunted streets.

Book Your Tour

Choose Your Tour

No prior ghost-hunting experience required — just a sense of adventure.

Van Tours

$49 / person

More seats, air conditioning, and a custom art wrap — same haunted Austin history.

Learn more →

Paranormal Investigation

$59 / person

Go hands-on with the spirits at The Clay Pit's historic Bertram Building every Saturday night.

Learn more →

Hearse Tours

from $99 / person

Climb into a classic Cadillac hearse converted into a spooky limousine and explore Austin after dark.

Learn more →

"We had a blast on the van tour led by Caden! A certain spirit said hello to us!"

— Lauren

"Loretta was incredible! Well worth the cost!"

— Lisa

"We had a great time last night with Caden! We have to do the limo tour next time!"

— Matt

"One of the best haunted tours we have been on and we have done a lot."

— Joy

"Riding around Austin at night in a hearse did not disappoint and our guide Kadean killed it!"

— James

"Amber was AWESOME. Best ghost tour we've ever been on. Highly recommend."

— MT DAWG

"Marisol was amazing and very in tune with the spirits! We did the Public hearse tour, it was awesome to ride around in the old vehicle."

— Adam

"This was so much fun and I even had a few ghostly interactions to my surprise! Do this!!!"

— Daphne

"This was so much fun and I even had a few ghostly interactions to my surprise! Do this!!!"

— Daphne

"This was the coolest experience! Kadean drove us around downtown Austin in a HEARSE!! Would 1000% recommend! I am definitely going to be doing this tour again."

— Kylee

"Caden was the absolute best!! We had an amazing experience and definitely want to do it again."

— Torrey

"Marisol gave a great tour! I can't praise their abilities to create a wonderful experience enough!"

— Zachary

"We went for a bachelorette party and it did not disappoint!"

— Caitlin

"Great fun, we REALLY enjoyed it!"

— Andrew

"Even if you're not into ghosts, getting to ride around in a vintage hearse makes it worth while!"

— Daphne
